title: AirClient
body:
### An Open-Source Minecraft Client inspired by [Badlion Client](https://www.badlion.net/minecraft-client) and [Lunar Client](https://lunarclient.com)

![LGPL 3 License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-LGPL--3.0-green) ![Written in Java](https://img.shields.io/badge/Language-Java-brown) ![Minecraft Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?url=https%3A%2F%2Fgit.pauljako.de%2FAirClient%2FAirClient%2Fraw%2Fbranch%2Fmaster%2Fversion-info.json&query=%24.stable%5B0%5D.versions%5B0%5D.minecraft&label=Minecraft) ![Fabric Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?url=https%3A%2F%2Fgit.pauljako.de%2FAirClient%2FAirClient%2Fraw%2Fbranch%2Fmaster%2Fversion-info.json&query=%24.stable%5B0%5D.versions%5B0%5D.loader_version&label=Fabric) ![Mod Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?url=https%3A%2F%2Fgit.pauljako.de%2FAirClient%2FAirClient%2Fraw%2Fbranch%2Fmaster%2Fversion-info.json&query=%24.stable%5B0%5D.name&label=Mod)

## About
AirClient is a Minecraft Client Mod inspired by [Badlion Client](https://www.badlion.net/minecraft-client) and [Lunar Client](https://lunarclient.com) meant to be completely Open-Source. As such, it does not have a lot of features and is still early in development.

## Current Feature-Set
- Cosmetics
	- Capes
		- Animated Capes
		- Capes from HTTP Server
		- Selection Screen
	- Deadmau5 Ears
	- Player Name Prefixes
		- Color Coding ([Reference](https://minecraftitemids.com/color-codes))
	- Sharing Cosmetics to other Players using a Websocket Server
- Overlays
	- Keystrokes
	- FPS
	- Position
	- Draggable HUD
		
- Setting Window Title and Title Screen Version Text
